headline: A.O. Smith: Some Challenges Remain, Although A Cautiously Optimistic Stance May Not Hurt (Rating Upgrade)
summary: A.O. Smith (AOS) upgraded to Buy: revenue growth returns, dividend strength, and discounted valuation vs peers.
